title: [Scheduling] Set up infrastructure for using OR-Tools' solvers.
body:
This PR makes solvers from OR-Tools optionally available in CIRCT. Note that binary distributions of OR-Tools don't seem to supply the required CMake config files. To that end, the library has to be build from source, e.g. using the commands as in https://github.com/circt/images/pull/13. I'll add a paragraph to the getting started doc and a script in `utils` in a later PR.

As a simple test case, I've implemented a scheduler for the basic `Problem`.
